mechanics.excerpt: Holovid production companies exist only on major worlds; typically as part the nuge media conglom- erates that help tie worlds together into nation Sharing news between worlds between separate dis tricts on world_ depends on the news itself ad the method of disbursal, The news must be relevant or at least high- profile, interest readers listeners and viewers who may be separated by many light-years, The method of transmission must be time ly ad cost-effective, like the HPG network managed by ComStar and the Word of Blake: Larger; multi-world vidcasting companies produce much of the reliable and relevant news reporting; along with the Interstellar Associated Press.
